cn_title: 《勇者斗恶龙12：超越梦境》最新进展

paragraphs.cn: 更新时间：2026年5月27日 19:03 UTC（北京时间5月28日凌晨3:03）

paragraphs.en: Square Enix issued a significant update on Dragon Quest 12 today, giving fans a quick look at the long-awaited RPG sequel. The Japanese company also dropped the bombshell that the game's development was restarted from scratch. As a result, Dragon Quest 12's original subtitle, The Flames of Fate, was ditched in favor of Dragon Quest 12: Beyond Dreams.
paragraphs.cn: Square Enix今日就《勇者斗恶龙12》发布了重要更新，让粉丝们对这部万众期待的RPG续作一窥究竟。这家日本公司同时投下重磅炸弹——本作开发已从零重启。也正因如此，《勇者斗恶龙12》原本的副标题「命运之炎」已被弃用，改名为《勇者斗恶龙12：超越梦境》。

paragraphs.en: In a special video to mark Dragon Quest's 40th anniversary on May 27, Dragon Quest 12 executive producer Yosuke Saito and game designer Yuji Horii shed light on the upcoming game's current state.
paragraphs.cn: 在5月27日《勇者斗恶龙》40周年纪念专题视频中，《勇者斗恶龙12》监制斋藤阳介与游戏设计师堀井雄二介绍了本作的最新进展。

paragraphs.en: "We're hard at work on 12," Saito said. "But it's going to be a bit longer until it's in your hands." He explaining that the title's development was overhauled after a team reshuffle. "Work on the original version, Dragon Quest 12: The Flames of Fate, hit a lot of hurdles along the way." Saito added. "But as we kept talking with Mr. Horii and pinned down what a mainline Dragon Quest game should look like, we decided to move things around and start over from scratch."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们正在全力开发12代，」斋藤说，「但要送到大家手上还需要一段时间。」他解释道，本作开发在团队调整之后进行了彻底重做。「最初版本《勇者斗恶龙12：命运之炎》在开发途中遇到了很多障碍，」斋藤补充道，「但在与堀井先生不断交流、确定一款正统《勇者斗恶龙》到底应该是什么样之后，我们决定调整方向、推倒重来。」

paragraphs.en: "It was a major decision, but I believe it's the right one," Saito said, citing that this rehaul will enable the dev team to make an enjoyable game that appeals to a wider range of Dragon Quest fans.
paragraphs.cn: 「这是一个重大的决定，但我相信这是对的。」斋藤说，他强调本次重做将让开发团队做出一款能让更广泛《勇者斗恶龙》粉丝感到愉悦的游戏。

paragraphs.en: It seems the devs changed Dragon Quest 12's protagonist, story and themes. Apparently, Beyond Dreams' hero has mysterious visions in his sleep, and the plot will delve into what lies beyond these dreams. "The game has gone in a different direction to what we originally announced, but I think you'll enjoy it," Horii said. Dragon Quest 12 will explore a "bright and exciting future," with Horii suggesting that Beyond Dreams may have ditched the darker tone that The Flames of Fate was set to bring to the 40-year-old series.
paragraphs.cn: 据悉，开发团队改变了《勇者斗恶龙12》的主角、故事与主题。《超越梦境》的主角会在梦中看到神秘的幻象，剧情将深入探讨这些梦境背后所蕴藏的世界。「游戏的方向与我们最初宣布的有所不同，但我相信大家会喜欢的。」堀井说道。《勇者斗恶龙12》将探索一个「明亮而令人激动的未来」，堀井暗示，《超越梦境》可能放弃了《命运之炎》原本要为这部走过40年的系列带来的那种较为黑暗的基调。

paragraphs.en: The game's development has changed direction but Horii reassured fans that quintessential Dragon Quest elements remain. Dragon Quest 12: Beyond Dreams will still have the late Akira Toriyama's iconic character designs and composer Koichi Sugiyama's epic score. Although Sugiyama passed away in 2021 and Toriyama in 2024, both creatives managed to complete work for Dragon Quest 12 before they departed. Both have worked on every entry in the series since 1986's Dragon Quest 1.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管开发方向已经改变，但堀井向粉丝承诺，《勇者斗恶龙》最精髓的元素依然保留。《勇者斗恶龙12：超越梦境》依旧采用已故的鸟山明标志性的角色设计，以及作曲家椙山浩一气势恢宏的配乐。椙山于2021年辞世，鸟山则于2024年离世，但两位大师在离开之前都已完成了《勇者斗恶龙12》的相关工作。两人自1986年《勇者斗恶龙1》以来参与了系列每一部正传作品。

paragraphs.en: However, it won't just be the same old classic gameplay. Saito said that Dragon Quest 12: Beyond Dreams will evolve the RPG series to the next level "with plenty of things you've never seen in a DQ game before."
paragraphs.cn: 不过，本作并不会只是延续一成不变的经典玩法。斋藤表示，《勇者斗恶龙12：超越梦境》将把RPG系列推向新的高度，「会有大量你在以往DQ游戏中从未见过的东西」。

paragraphs.en: Dragon Quest fans have been waiting a long time. Dragon Quest 12: The Flames of Fate was announced in 2021 during the series' 35th anniversary celebrations. It's also been eight years since the last mainline entry, Dragon Quest 11, was released. Saito and Horii did not give any hints as to a release timeline for Dragon Quest 12: Beyond Dreams, so fans will have to wait a bit longer.
paragraphs.cn: 《勇者斗恶龙》粉丝已经等待许久。《勇者斗恶龙12：命运之炎》早在2021年系列35周年庆典上就已宣布。距离上一部正统续作《勇者斗恶龙11》的发售也已过去八年。斋藤和堀井并未透露《勇者斗恶龙12：超越梦境》的发售时间窗口，因此粉丝们还需要再等一段时间。

paragraphs.en: During the 40th anniversary celebration, Square Enix also revealed that spin-off title Dragon Quest Monsters: The Withered World will be coming to PS5, Xbox Series X/S, PC, Switch and Switch 2 (release date to be announced later). The game will feature Dragon Quest 5's Nera and Bianca as dual protagonists. Also, Dragon Quest 11 S: Echoes of an Elusive Age will be coming to Switch 2 on September 24.
paragraphs.cn: 在40周年庆典中，Square Enix同时公布外传作品《勇者斗恶龙怪兽篇：枯萎之世》将登陆PS5、Xbox Series X/S、PC、Switch及Switch 2（发售日期将另行公布）。该作将启用《勇者斗恶龙5》中的妮拉与碧安卡作为双主角。此外，《勇者斗恶龙11 S：寻觅逝去的时光》将于9月24日登陆Switch 2。
